[[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] owned a '''castle''' on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Kohlma]]. [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] of [[Serenno/Legends|Serenno]] was known to use this lair as a base of operations during his years as [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious's]] [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]].

==History==
[[File:Serenno.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Dooku's Lair on Kohlma.]]

The lair, designed with distinctive pointed and thorn-like architecture, was located on top of a mountain spire. The gray interior was lined with grotesque gothic statues of unknown origin, depicting [[Human/Legends|Humans]] (or [[near-Human]]s) holding large swords. The castle also contained at least two giant statues of boar-faced humanoids, likewise holding large swords, flanking one of the entrances. Several traps may have existed to deter unwanted guests; among them, a [[Unidentified tentacled serpent|snake-like tentacled beast]] lurking under the entrance walkway, which even Dooku himself had to fend off in order to enter the lair.

[[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Sidious once met Dooku there in person only a short time after [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] Palpatine's election. It was here that Dooku tortured [[Silas (Mandalorian)|Silas]] to reveal information on [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], and where he held a meeting with Fett prior to the Mandalorian's recruitment as the [[Clone template/Legends|Prime clone]].

Dooku also met with [[Bok]] and [[Kh'aris Fenn]] here after his plot to put Fenn in charge of Ryloth failed.<ref name="Star Wars Republic: Rite of Passage">[[Star Wars (1998) 45|''Star Wars'' (1998) 45]]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Intdookucastle.jpg|thumb|The entrance hall of Dooku's lair.]]
''[[The Unseen Planets of Episode II]]'', an article from [[Star Wars Insider 80|''Star Wars Insider'' 80]], places this particular residence on the uninhabited graveyard world of Kohlma.

The name "Dooku's Lair" first appeared on Chris Trevas' website.<ref name="Approaching Dooku's Lair">{{WebCite|url=http://www.christrevas.com/starwars/swinside2b.html|text="Approaching Dooku's Lair - Bogden Moon of Kohlma"|work=[[Chris Trevas]]'s website|archivedate=20080915191300}}</ref> which also confirmed that the lair was located on the Bogden Moon of Kohlma.
